# terrible_cisco_meraki_networks_wireless_ssids_splash_settings (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `allowSimultaneousLogins` (Boolean) Whether or not to allow simultaneous logins from different devices.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `billing` (String) Details associated with billing splash.
- `blockAllTrafficBeforeSignOn` (Boolean) How restricted allowing traffic should be. If true, all traffic types are blocked until the splash page is acknowledged. If false, all non-HTTP traffic is allowed before the splash page is acknowledged.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `controllerDisconnectionBehavior` (String) How login attempts should be handled when the controller is unreachable. Can be either 'open', 'restricted', or 'default'.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `guestSponsorship` (String) Details associated with guest sponsored splash.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `networkId` (String) NetworkId path parameter. Network ID.
- `number` (String) Number path parameter.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `redirectUrl` (String) The custom redirect URL where the users will go after the splash page.
- `selfRegistration` (String) Self-registration settings for splash with Meraki authentication.
- `sentryEnrollment` (String) Systems Manager sentry enrollment splash settings.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `splashImage` (String) The image used in the splash page.
- `splashLogo` (String) The logo used in the splash page.
- `splashPrepaidFront` (String) The prepaid front image used in the splash page.
- `splashTimeout` (Number) Splash timeout in minutes. This will determine how often users will see the splash page.
- `splashUrl` (String) Optional The custom splash URL of the click-through splash page. Note that the URL can be configured without necessarily being used. In order to enable the custom URL, see 'useSplashUrl'.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `themeId` (String) The id of the selected splash theme.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `useRedirectUrl` (Boolean) The Boolean indicating whether the the user will be redirected to the custom redirect URL after the splash page. A custom redirect URL must be set if this is true.
- `useSplashUrl` (Boolean) Optional Boolean indicating whether the users will be redirected to the custom splash url. A custom splash URL must be set if this is true. Note that depending on your SSID's access control settings, it may not be possible to use the custom splash URL.
- `welcomeMessage` (String) The welcome message for the users on the splash page.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
